title: Sodium-Glucose Cotransporter-2 Inhibitors Following Acute Myocardial Infarction in Patients Without Diabetes Mellitus: A Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
abstract: Sodium-glucose transporter 2 (SGLT2) inhibitors have shown significant cardiovascular benefits in heart failure (HF) patients with diabetes mellitus or chronic kidney disease. However, their safety and efficacy in non-diabetic patients without HF presenting with acute myocardial infarction (AMI) remain understudied.
